{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321120040DEDFE829797460AF0378"}"},"total":625},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7532919262183375640","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺有意思的一本书。
只可惜好像作者不太擅长，在书中加点刀子的剧情。
虽然有刀，但不算太刀，因为说到底这本书还是偏向于欢乐和有趣的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753906665,"group_id":"7504671294437215294","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"∠( ᐛ 」∠)_乐","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0AY0bOfAv2wnk8Pg8Z7TD4=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a7c0162484774d17a99f2e15bc5e8609~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615235&x-signature=LdobgCVrJzzJtQPiGRmXG4OOehE%3D","user_id":"104680234794","user_name":"寻找欢乐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104680234794","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1694696260,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7504671294437215294","book_info":{"abstract":"【发癫】【多女主】
林默穿越了二次元，还获得了金手指系统，签到系统，顾名思义，每天都可以签到诸天万界的东西。
但是！
“由于穿越途中系统受损，迫不得已占用了宿主一部分脑力，可能会对您的智力造成一定影响，请您见谅！”
林默表示完全不慌，区区脑力而已，占用就占用吧，毕竟自己机智的一批！
然后……
雪之下雪乃：“不打不相识根本就不是这个意思好吧！”
加藤惠：“我根本就不是什么冠位刺客，不要再喊我哈桑了！”
小鸟游六花：“不要再想着移植我的邪王真眼了，会死人的吧！”
珈百璃：“不要拿我的天使光环干那种事啊喂！”
康纳：“康纳不要再喝牛奶了！”
总之，这是一个笨蛋在二次元搞抽象的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3c5b3bc5fc4d991b15428d969b9318ec","author":"会飞的手机","author_id":"","book_id":"7504671294437215294","book_name":"综漫：我机智的一批","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#887078","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7506175395331326526","read_count":"10947","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"578560"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"248","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,多女主,综漫,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2c3262293bf7e40abb7e855c58375923~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779249640&x-signature=ZwGmi7fRugmFmJIVWBZZ1LGkK5Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1333073414457003","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"193"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321120040DEDFE829797460AF0378"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"liste
